summary: Soundboard source with modest fidelity captures an outstanding 1987 show deemed one of the year's best.
review: The reviewer notes that, while this is finally a sound‑board recording, it isn’t pristine and offers little improvement over audience tapes. Nevertheless, the performance itself is described as amazing – arguably one of the top shows of 1987 – earning a full five‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, brief review is available; it praises the show highly but criticizes the recording quality, leading to a weighted estimate of ~4.4 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Not pristine sounding; does not markedly improve over existing audience recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply calls the overall show amazing.
